name: Supabase Auth
description: Supabase Auth REST API (GoTrue) for user authentication and management. Sign up and sign in users with email/password, magic links, OTP, or OAuth providers. Manage sessions with JWT tokens, handle password resets, verify OTP codes, and administer users. Supports both client-side and admin (service_role) operations.

capabilities.name: sign_up
capabilities.description: Create a new user account with email/password or phone/password.

capabilities.name: sign_in_password
capabilities.description: Sign in with email/password or phone/password.

capabilities.name: sign_in_otp
capabilities.description: Send a magic link or OTP for passwordless authentication.

capabilities.name: verify_otp
capabilities.description: Verify an OTP code or token hash to complete authentication.

capabilities.name: sign_in_oauth
capabilities.description: Initiate OAuth sign-in with a third-party provider.

capabilities.name: sign_out
capabilities.description: Sign out the authenticated user by invalidating their token.

capabilities.name: send_password_reset
capabilities.description: Send a password reset email with a recovery link.

capabilities.name: resend_otp
capabilities.description: Resend an OTP or confirmation email/SMS.

capabilities.name: refresh_token
capabilities.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new access and refresh token pair.

capabilities.name: get_user
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile and metadata.

capabilities.name: update_user
capabilities.description: Update the authenticated user's email, password, phone, or metadata.

capabilities.name: invite_user
capabilities.description: Send an invitation email to a new user (admin only).

capabilities.name: admin_users_list
capabilities.description: List all users in the project (admin only).

capabilities.name: admin_user_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific user by ID (admin only).

capabilities.name: admin_user_update
capabilities.description: Update a user's attributes including ban status and role (admin only).

capabilities.name: admin_user_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a user account permanently (admin only).
